title: AgentDefinition

instructions.description: The agent's system prompt / instructions, verbatim.

provider.description: The provider this Definition targets when deployed.

model.description: The provider's model identifier (e.g. a Claude model name).

type.description: Discriminant identifying this as a builtin toolset grant.

toolset.description: Which provider-hosted builtin toolset is granted to the agent.

oneOf.description: Grants one of the provider-hosted builtin toolsets (coding, search, files).

type.description: Discriminant identifying this as a custom tool definition.

name.description: Unique name of the custom tool, as the model will call it.

description.description: Description of the custom tool shown to the model to guide when and how it is invoked.

inputSchema.description: JSON Schema (as a plain object) describing the custom tool's input shape.

oneOf.description: Defines a custom, non-MCP tool the agent may call.

type.description: Discriminant identifying this as an MCP server grant.

serverUrl.description: URL of the MCP server exposing the tool(s).

label.description: Human-readable label for this MCP server in tool pickers and logs.

auth.description: Whether this MCP server requires no authentication, or is matched to a Credential by serverUrl at session creation.

permissionPolicy.description: Declared tool-call policy for this server: `always_allow` — execute once the call is otherwise authorized against the grants of the pinned AgentDefinition version; `always_ask` — additionally require a per-call approval before execution. This field states policy intent a conformant server MUST honour; the approval mechanism `always_ask` requires is defined by a separate authorization sub-protocol, not by this field, and a server MUST NOT treat `always_ask` as satisfied merely by executing the call.

toolAllowlist.description: Declared restriction a conformant server MUST enforce before dispatch: if present, only these tool names are usable on this server — a server MUST reject any other name pre-dispatch; if absent, every tool the server exposes is usable.

oneOf.description: Grants access to tools exposed by a remote MCP server, matched to a Credential by serverUrl at session creation.

tools.description: The tools available to the agent: builtin toolsets, custom tools, or MCP server grants.

guardrails.description: Opaque v0 guardrail identifiers/policy names applied to the agent. Structure beyond a name is left to profiles until two implementations interoperate on guardrail internals.

draftVersion.description: The draft head version number. Every edit to the Definition advances this.

publishedVersion.description: The version number live conversations pin to. Null if this Definition has never been published; otherwise only advanced by the explicit publish interaction.

scope.description: The generalized-ownership attachment point this Definition belongs to.

description: The canonical, provider-neutral definition of an agent.

Provider.description: Agent-hosting provider. `anthropic` is the reference adapter; `openai` and `google` are reserved by name for future adapters.

level.description: Which level of the tenant/workspace/user/group/role taxonomy this attachment point is at.

id.description: Identifier of the scoped entity (the tenant id, workspace id, user id, group id, or role id).

Scope.description: A generalized-ownership attachment point: a taxonomy level plus the identifier at that level.
